result.stdout:
RW7.DotNetSecurityTools - create-jwk
Copyright (C) 2021 Reece Williams

  -t, --output-types       (Default: Console) Where to direct the output to
                           (multiple can be specified). Supported - console,
                           file

  -d, --directory          The directory path to output the files to, if 'file'
                           selected as an output type. Defaults to a new folder
                           on the users temp path if not specified.

  -b, --output-base64      (Default: false) Output JWK as Base64 Encoded string

  -r, --output-rsa-keys    (Default: false) Output RSA Public and Private Keys

  -p, --output-pkcs8       (Default: false) Output PKCS8 Private Jey

  --help                   Display this help screen.

  --version                Display version information.
